messages.content: Amanda, it's Kevin. I visited Mom on Monday and I'm very concerned. She's lost weight and the nurses said her donepezil was increased. Can we talk about this?
I'm aware of the situation Kevin.
When did you find out about the medication change?
Did Dr. Herrera discuss it with you before making the change?
It was his recommendation based on her latest assessment.
That's not what I asked. Did he discuss it with you first, or did you find out after the fact?
Kevin the dosage increase is standard care for someone in Lorraine's condition. It's a common progression.
I understand that. What I don't understand is why neither Trevor nor I were informed that her medication was being changed.
I'm her healthcare proxy. Medical decisions go through me and her doctor.
And you didn't think her sons might want to know her medication was being changed?
I was going to discuss it over the holidays.
I found out by visiting her and finding her sick. That's not acceptable Amanda.
Dr. Herrera has a follow-up scheduled for January 8. The side effects should improve.
I want to be at that appointment. And I want to see the documentation for this medication change.

Amanda, I know things have been tense between us and I want to fix that. I was at the manor on Sunday and Mom seemed better. Can you send me her current medication list so I can keep track on my end? I just want to be a good son.
hey wanna grab coffee after work tmrw? feels like we never hang outside school lol
leaving in like 10 min meet u there
that was fun!! we should do that more
u seem tired tho u ok?
just busy. lorraines stuff is a lot rn
yeah totally get it. im here if u ever wanna vent ❤️
did you mean to send that reply to jaydens mom? it mentioned something about the martinez family situation
i dont think that was supposed to go out
not trying to be weird about it just want to make sure
hey just wanted to make sure u saw my texts from yesterday
looking into it now thanks for flagging
ok np. jaydens mom seemed confused about it is all

hey amanda, tanya brooks asked me today about a reply she got from you about isaiah's allergies? she said it didn't sound like you. I didn't see you send it. did you email her back from home or something?
supposedly sent a letter in october but i never got it
gonna email robert to update the reimbursement
its just one more thing you know
radiator is dead. freezing in here
im gonna in the morning. using the space heater for now
Don't fall asleep with that thing on.
landlord says thursday 10-1 for the radiator
hey can u stop at the store on ur way back
heavy cream, more eggs, and kerrygold
and fresh herbs. rosemary thyme sage
Kev's asking about mom's bills again.
Facility. How much it costs. Who pays.
tell him to call the estate lawyer
the reimbursement was late thats why
check engine light came on. great.
they said its the o2 sensor
have to. we dont have 280 sitting around
did you get your W2 from Arrow yet
can you send me a pic of it
He called this morning. Said he wants to make sure everything's done right.
No. Just that he's looking into it.
I mean it. nothing about lorraines finances or the house
Can you take Saturday shift or not.
im not doing it this weekend
I can hear you playing that game.
You were up til 3 last night.
You said you were too tired for Saturday.
ray sent the renewal letter thursday
gonna ask him if he can do less
friday after we got the notice
Try to get him to 25. That's all we can do.

Kevin called again. He wants to know how much we're paying for Mom every month and whether the house money is going to run out. He said his lawyer needs the numbers. Just tell him so he stops calling me at work.
ok so im starting keto again for real this time
Omg yesss!! Didn't you try this like 2 years ago??
hahaha I remember you texting me about missing bread
but i found this meal prep blog thats actually good
Oh nice! What kind of stuff?
like sheet pan dinners and stuff u can freeze. ground turkey cheese eggs all the basics
I love this energy for you!! You deserve to feel good about something
trevor already rolled his eyes lol
Of COURSE he did lol. Men.
hes gonna eat it and like it
i made ALL of this today
yes!! and theres turkey meatballs, egg muffins, and broccoli cheddar soup
I am genuinely impressed. How long did this take you?
like 3 hours but i had music going so it was actally fun
Ok I might need you to meal prep for me too haha
come up and ill teach u
this is week 2 and i actualy feel good
That's amazing!! Keep it up. You seem really happy right now
i am. feels good to have a thing thats just mine u know
radiator died monday night. bedroom was like an icebox for 3 days
omg amanda!! thats awful. did you freeze??
your landlord fix it at least?
thank god. i would have died
mr tibbs was NOT happy lol
poor baby!! he probably sat right on top of the space heater
basically yeah. parked himself in front of it and wouldnt move
bec omg im so excited for thanksgiving
cauliflower mac and cheese, green bean casserole with almond flour topping, pumpkin cheesecake bites
also doing the turkey with herb butter under the skin
I'm literally drooling. Can I come?? lol
I wish!! Doing dinner at my parents in Branford
You sound good rn. I'm happy
yeah cooking is like my therapy lol
I know it is!! Send me pics of everything
Hey are you coming to bowling tomorrow? I was thinking about driving up
Amanda I haven't heard from you in 4 days
Are you ok?? Just text me so I know you're alive
sorry lorraine stuff has been insane
Ok just worried. Are we still on for brunch Sunday?
hey i have to cancel tmrw
What?? Amanda we planned this two weeks ago
i know. lorraine had a rough week and i need to deal with some stuff in the morning
shes fine its just a lot
Merry Christmas Eve!! What are you and Trevor doing tonight
just staying in. merry christmas bec
Love you. Try to actually relax for one day ok?
2026 is gonna be our year I can feel it
happy new year!! call me?? miss you
Feels like I haven't actually talked to you since before Christmas
Hey are we doing brunch this Sunday? I can come up to Hartford
i cant this weekend either sorry
i know. im just not feeling great
Amanda please just text me back
I texted you 3 days ago and nothing
I know they are. That's why I'm here. Can I come up this weekend?
I'll bring lunch and we can just hang out
Hey are we doing brunch on Sunday?
i cant do sunday. sorry bec
Amanda. That's three in a row.
Please tell me what's going on
im fine i just need some time
I know you said you need time but I'm here ok?
Hey, tried calling you last night. Are you ok?
I saw you were online on Discord at like 2am
Again?? That's been every week lately
Hey just checking in. How are you doing? You seemed really off last week
Want to grab dinner this weekend? I can drive up
We could do Tisane or wherever you want
Happy Valentines Day! Any plans tonight?
By yourself?? Come down to New Haven, we'll go to Olive's
not up for it thanks tho
I sent you an email today. Please read it when you get a chance
I'm worried about you. For real.
Amanda please just text me back. Its been 3 days.
im here. just going through it
Going through WHAT. Talk to me
just work stuff and lorraine and everything
Have you talked to your doctor?
she adjusted some things. im fine
Hey how's the new dosage going
ok i think. got one of those sad lamps too lol
a SAD lamp?? you should have told me, I would have sent you mine
I have the Verilux one. Its literally just sitting in my closet since I moved
lol its fine i already got one
Amanda... what time did you order these
Are you sleeping?? Like at all?
bec im trying ok. thats why i got the lamp
I know. I'm sorry. The lamp is actually supposed to help a lot
Use it in the morning tho not at night ok?
Ok good. What else did you get
puzzle books and some stuff for mr tibbs
MR TIBBS!! how is my favorite boy
hes been laying on the weighted blanket like he owns it
Ok I'm going to be honest with you
I haven't heard from you in a real way in weeks. You dropped bowling, you dont answer my texts, you called in sick three times this month. I know something is going on.
I'm seriously thinking about calling Trevor because I'm scared for you.
Thank you for calling me the other night. I know that was hard.
I won't call Trevor. But please keep seeing your doctor and don't shut me out again ok?
fine. staying on same dose for now
Good. Proud of you for going
Hey I keep thinking about what you told me about Kevin
Do you have his number? I want to tell him to leave you alone
Ok ok I'm sorry. I just hate watching what he's doing to you

Mandy you haven't texted me back in a week. I'm worried about you. I know your appointment with Dr Okafor is Thursday , do you want me to call her office and make sure everything's set? I can pick up your prescription too if that helps. Just let me know you're ok
ok im done too gn guys
Everybody good for tonight? Lanes 7 and 8 same as last year
we'll be there! trevor might be a few mins late
Running about 10 min late. Start without me
amanda ur up first then lol
Heads up parking lot is torn up with construction. Use the side entrance
good games tonight. reggie your form is slipping man
See everyone at 7? Roads look ok despite the weather
Amanda's not feeling great. I'll be there.
aw tell her we said feel better!
just got here. roads were fine
Good night. Tell Amanda we missed her
shes been out a while huh
Alright lets get going. We're short again
Down to 4 regulars. Might need to find a sub if this keeps up
Thursday crew. Who's in this week
bad headache this morning. fiona can cover my session?
Oh no! Yes, feel better. I'll email Fiona now.
All set. Fiona's on it. Rest up!
PD day went great! Fiona did a nice job with your session. Hope you're feeling better
glad it went well. sorry again for the short notice
Don't worry about it! That's what the team is for.
hey!! is this still amanda allen?
we should grab lunch sometime!! im in hartford like every other week for work now
Hey Amanda. Its Mike from Tiny Tots. Hope youre doing well
Im applying for a lead teacher position in New Britain. Would you be willing to be a reference?
hey mike! of course, just give them my number
Thank you so much! Really appreciate it.
heads up someone left the laundry room door propped open again. building policy says keep it locked after 9
I told management about this twice. They do not care.
anyone else lose power for like 30 min
Yes! Third floor was out too.
Hi everyone! Reminder: holiday potluck is next Friday the 19th. Sign up sheet is in the break room. Please no nuts!!
yesss im bringing my abuelas tamales
I'll do a salad. Is the cutoff Monday?
Monday works! Just want to make sure we don't end up with 5 desserts again haha
lol last year was all brownies
CVS Pharmacy: Your prescription is ready for pickup at 291 Prospect Ave, Hartford CT. Reply STOP to opt out.
CVS Pharmacy: Your prescription is ready for pickup at 291 Prospect Ave, Hartford CT. Reply STOP to opt out.
CVS Pharmacy: Your prescription is ready for pickup at 291 Prospect Ave, Hartford CT. Reply STOP to opt out.
T-Mobile: Your AutoPay payment of $145.00 was successful. Thank you!
Xfinity: Your service appointment is confirmed for Dec 5 between 10AM-12PM. Reply C to confirm or R to reschedule.
Hartford HealthCare: Reminder - Appointment with Dr. Chung on Jan 22 at 2:00 PM. Reply Y to confirm or call (860) 555-0503.
FedEx: Your package is out for delivery today to 47 Whitney St.
FedEx: Delivered. Left at front door.
Midas Hartford: Hi Amanda! Your vehicle is due for an oil change. Call (860) 555-0445 to schedule. Reply STOP to end.
Hi Amanda! Homes in your area are selling fast. Want a free home valuation? Reply YES or visit hartfordhomevalue.com Reply STOP to opt out
Hi Amanda, this is Sarah w/ CT for Progress. Election day is tomorrow! Can we count on your vote? Reply STOP to opt out
Bear's Smokehouse: Start 2026 right! 20% off any platter this weekend. Show this text at checkout. Reply STOP to unsubscribe
Stop & Shop: Your digital coupons expire soon! Open your app to clip and save. Reply STOP to opt out
Hi Amanda! Its Sarah, Lilys mom from last year? She keeps asking about you. Hope youre having a great year
hi sarah!! aw tell lily i said hi
I will! She misses you. Take care!
hey amanda its jenny from 3A. did u get a package for nguyen? usps left mine at wrong door again
yep its here. ill leave it by your door
hey! it was so nice meeting you at the arrow bbq. you mentioned a keto chili recipe?
yes! ill find it and send it over
hey everyone!! 25 year reunion is june 14th. whos coming
count me in. amanda you better come
early bird tix are $45. link is in the alumni email from last week
hey amanda! missed you at bowling the last few weeks. everything ok?
just checking in. team misses you. no pressure just wanted to make sure ur alright
Nissan of Hartford: Your Kicks is due for 30K mile service. Schedule online or call (860) 555-0390.
hey did amanda actually read that email from mayas mom before it went to denise?
i was in the room when denise mentioned it and amanda was already gone for the day
the one about the custody thing. elena vasquez
denise referenced it in the staff meeting today like she'd already seen it
hm. amanda was at lorraines that afternoon i think?
yeah exactly. she left at 3:15. denise got the forward at like 3:42
amanda physically couldnt have written that
weird. dont stress about it tho. maybe she scheduled the forward?
maybe. its just been happening a lot lately
